what: DECLARED (immutable) candidate space for the /pure-search-loop: axes x values + baseline best-stack. Outcomes live in a SEPARATE append-only ledger (bench/qk-pure-search-loop/decode_attention_loop_ledger.jsonl). The generator (extra/qk_pure_search_next_candidate.py) is the SINGLE source of truth for candidate selection -- the loop must never hand-pick or use audit next_actions as authority.
active_space: one-factor singles (axis x value) PLUS pairs of cheap knobs. Pairs ARE in scope (Level-1 exhaustion includes them); the generator includes pairs by default. SEARCH_SPACE_EXHAUSTED => every single AND pair is in the ledger.

axes.hypothesis: stage width changes the coalesced global-load vectorization; may trade occupancy vs bandwidth
unroll depth trades ILP vs VGPR; 16 may overflow occupancy, 4 may underhide the tt-carry
ds_bpermute inline vs LDS-staged reduce trades cross-lane vs waitcnt
K=4 independent b-partitions; predicted refuted (same occupancy class as K=2: VGPR/LDS scale with K)

the 'more workgroups' (Level-2) lever: higher split count S -> more workgroups (S=48 gives 384 wg; higher S gives more). Manufactures T=1 parallelism. Its cost is the split-KV COMBINE tax, which is IN-MODEL only -> isolated timing MISLEADS; must be gated by W==D. Predicted combine-economics-capped (docs/split-kv-economics-audit-result-20260621.md) but UNTRIED for the generated block tile.
axes.added_by: Z (loop self-improvement 2026-06-27): X knob space exhausted, Y found this untried lever, Z expanded the search from knobs to topology + flagged the W==D gate requirement

ledger: MOVED -> bench/qk-pure-search-loop/decode_attention_loop_ledger.jsonl (append-only JSONL; the generator reads it to prune)
